patch.value: pm validate metadata report grouped by item type (GH-172)
Metadata-required-field counts are global; group missing-field report per item type for targeted remediation. GitHub issue #172.

value.author: validate-autofix-agent
value.text: Implemented details.missing_by_type on the metadata check: { <ItemType>: { <field>: count } }, zero-suppressed at both levels, sorted lexicographically, and restricted to the ACTIVE metadata profile's required fields so it mirrors details.counts at type granularity. Counts only (never row dumps) for token efficiency; per-field item-id lists remain the existing verbose-diagnostics surface. Pure aggregation lives in src/core/validate/missing-by-type.ts (fully unit-tested).

patch.value: Metadata check details expose missing-field counts grouped by item type for targeted remediation
details.missing_by_type emits zero-suppressed, sorted { type: { field: count } } for active required fields via new src/core/validate/missing-by-type.ts; unit-tested in validate-command.spec.ts
Added per-item-type missing-required-field grouping to pm validate --check-metadata
